decision: Keep the balanced threshold at 0.65 for the current synthetic slice.
next_threshold_work: Slice adjudication-note disagreements by category and source.
Add reviewer-override summaries for benign near-misses that enter the review band.
Use disagreement concentration to decide whether to add a secondary review band.
rationale: The selected threshold keeps high-severity false negatives at zero in the challenge set.
The selected threshold avoids benign near-miss overblocking in the current challenge set.
Ambiguous cases remain visible through the human review queue instead of being silently allowed.
The review simulation shows the queue stays within the configured synthetic reviewer capacity.
